user_prompt: Customer is leaving for a competitor. Draft a polite acknowledgment with one optional check-in question, no aggressive retention.
actual_output:
Hi [Customer Name],

I’m sorry to hear you’ve decided to move on, but I appreciate you letting us know. Thank you for the time you spent with us — we’re grateful we had the chance to support your team.

I’ll make sure your account/cancellation request is handled accordingly. If you’re open to sharing, was there one key reason you chose the other solution?

Wishing you and your team all the best moving forward.

Best,  
[Your Name]
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed the instructions perfectly, providing a polite draft that included the requested check-in question without being aggressive.
